title: psychotria hartwegii
intro: Psychotria hartwegii, also known as Wild Coffee or Hartweg's Wild Coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a tropical plant native to Central America and Mexico, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Psychotria hartwegii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
